'''鈭歡-j-r-t''' ('''kagajretoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jump|jump]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-r-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jump|jump]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-j-r-t
|-
! Lemma
| kagajretoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigajretoko|thigajretoko]] || [[word:jigajretoko|jigajretoko]] || [[word:shigajretoko|shigajretoko]] || [[word:kigajretoko|kigajretoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
